title: Multi-Agent Production Pipeline v1 Regression Suite

scenarios.expect: each artifact class has exactly one owning role
a non-owner proposal is rejected fail-closed
a direct trusted write is never authorized
duplicate ownership of a class fails closed
a clean handoff is accepted (routes through review/apply)
concurrent edits to one base conflict and block deterministically
a declared/computed status mismatch fails closed
promotion is blocked until the reviewer approves
medium/high risk requires an explicit critic approval
promote-allowed only routes through review/apply, never auto-applied
the demo gate progresses from blocked to promote-allowed only after review
the existing single-agent evolve campaign remains valid
the existing single-agent safe source-apply remains valid
